chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1864 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 7418/25 3.For orders on CMA 7419/25 4.For hearing of main case 03-12-2025 Mr. Jaleel Ahmed Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Admittedly, the petitioner has already availed the remedy by filing an Appeal against his suspension and transfer, which is presently pending adjudication before the Chairman, Sindh Bank Limited, Head Office, Karachi. Since the petitioner has approached this Court for the same relief without awaiting the outcome of the said Appeal; hence, the petition is premature. Accordingly, this petition, along with the listed application, is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
